electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 121 dB peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [5XT] preset; extends to 40 Hz with SB15m or 27 Hz with SB10i subwoofer support
electroacoustic.components: 1 x 5" cone driver (LF) coaxially loaded with 1 x 1" diaphragm compression driver (HF); 2-way passive with internal custom-filter crossover; bass-reflex LF loading

operating_modes: Standard (passive, single amplifier channel per enclosure)
Low-latency mode for stage-monitor use ([5XT_MO]) on X/A series controllers
amplification.per_amplifier_note: Manual drive-capacity table (per output / total): LA2Xi 4/16 (SE), LA4X 4/16, LA8 6/24, LA12X 6/24. App per_amplifier values used directly from inputs.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired in parallel, interchangeable as IN or LINK; plus 2x 2-point screw terminals each acting as IN/LINK. Internal pinout uses speakON 1+/1- for the transducer; points 2+/2- not linked.
connection.breakouts: SP-Y1 (4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON, with CC4FP adapter) for two enclosures; DOSUB-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON) for four enclosures; optional 5XT-SEALPLATE for screw-terminal cabling (cable gland fits up to 4 mm gauge)

physical.dimensions_note: Manual diagram explicitly labels width only (165 mm / 6.5 in); enclosure is near-cubic per official L-Acoustics data (165 x 165 x 165 mm).
physical.protection_rating: IP30 standard; IP54 with 5XT-SEALPLATE and a down-tilt angle of 20 degrees or more
physical.cabinet: premium grade Baltic birch plywood, steel front with anti-corrosion coating; finish dark grey brown Pantone 426 C or pure white RAL 9010 (custom RAL on special order)

modes: Point source with SB15m or SB10i subwoofer for extended LF
Wall-mounted or ceiling-mounted via ETR5 U-bracket
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Not flown as an array; deployed as a single point-source element. Wall/ceiling mount limit 1 per ETR5; pole-mount limit 1 per stand.
deployment.inter_element_angles: Not applicable (single-enclosure point source; ETR5 provides site-angle adjustment)
rigging_accessories: ETR5 adjustable U-bracket (2x M6 inserts on enclosure sides)
3/8" insert on bottom face for microphone stand
ETR5 also doubles as connector protection in storage

usage: Ultra-compact 5" coaxial point source for short-throw fill, foreground music, and discreet install jobs where a minimal visual footprint matters; the near-cubic 165 mm cabinet weighs only 3.5 kg.
Each 5XT needs a single passive amplifier channel; pack them densely on one controller - up to 16 per LA4X/LA2Xi, 24 per LA12X, or 48 on an LA7.16(i) per the app counts.
Load the [5XT] factory preset for FOH/fill duty or [5XT_MO] for floor-monitor use; a low-latency variant of the monitor preset trims delay to roughly 0.84-1.18 ms depending on controller.
Pair with SB15m (down to 40 Hz) or SB10i (down to 27 Hz) and apply the matching [SB15_100]/[SB10_100] presets; keep adjacent sub acoustic centers within 1.7 m when a 100 Hz crossover is used.

Wire IN and LINK speakON connectors interchangeably to daisy-chain units in parallel, but watch the 16 ohm nominal load so total paralleled enclosures stay within the per-output limit (4 on LA2Xi/LA4X, 6 on LA8/LA12X).
For outdoor or wet installs, fit the 5XT-SEALPLATE and aim the box at 20 degrees or more down-tilt to reach IP54; the bare enclosure is only IP30.
